vocab.meaning: rất phổ biến, đâu đâu cũng thấy
vocab.example: E-commerce websites are a dime a dozen these days, but only a few really dominate the local market.

vocab.word: be a cut above the rest
vocab.meaning: vượt trội hơn hẳn so với phần còn lại
vocab.example: When it comes to user interface, that international social platform is a cut above the rest compared to domestic sites.

vocab.meaning: tạo được một thị trường/chỗ đứng riêng
vocab.example: Several local startups have managed to carve out a niche by offering specialized logistics services online.

vocab.word: give someone a run for their money
vocab.ipa: /ɡɪv ˈsʌm.wʌn ə rʌn fɔːr ðeə ˈmʌn.i/
vocab.meaning: trở thành đối thủ đáng gờm, cạnh tranh gay gắt
vocab.example: New video-sharing platforms are definitely giving traditional television a run for their money in my country.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí kiểm soát, dẫn đầu xu hướng
vocab.example: Major tech conglomerates are in the driving seat, shaping the way Vietnamese people consume digital content.

vocab.meaning: đạt được chỗ đứng vững chắc
vocab.example: Fintech websites gained a foothold during the pandemic and have since become indispensable for daily transactions.

vocab.word: be the talk of the town
vocab.meaning: là chủ đề được mọi người bàn tán sôi nổi
vocab.example: That new AI-integrated search engine has been the talk of the town among the tech-savvy youth recently.
With their lightning-fast delivery, certain shopping sites have left traditional retailers in the dust.

vocab.meaning: một xu hướng nổi đình đám nhưng thường ngắn hạn
vocab.example: Many niche social apps become the flavor of the month, garnering millions of downloads before fading away.

vocab.meaning: thu hẹp khoảng cách (về thông tin, địa lý...)
vocab.example: Educational websites have helped bridge the gap between rural students and high-quality learning resources.
